headlines.title: Trump and Xi conclude 'very successful' talks in Beijing but no deals confirmed
headlines.summary: President Trump and China's Xi Jinping wrapped up a two-day summit in Beijing with positive tone but no concrete trade breakthroughs. Xi warned Trump that differences over Taiwan could trigger conflict.

headlines.title: New Ebola outbreak kills 65 in eastern DR Congo
headlines.summary: Africa's top health agency reports approximately 246 cases of Ebola in a remote region of the Democratic Republic of Congo, with 65 deaths confirmed so far.

headlines.title: U.S. military intercepts Iranian attacks on Navy ships in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: The U.S. military reported intercepting Iranian attacks on three Navy ships in the Strait of Hormuz, targeting Iranian military facilities responsible for the attacks.

headlines.title: CIA chief visits Cuba as energy crisis worsens
headlines.summary: CIA Director John Ratcliffe met with Raul Castro's grandson in Havana following a U.S. offer of aid to ease effects of the oil blockade on Cuba.

headlines.title: India's Adanis agree to pay $18m to settle civil fraud case in the US
headlines.summary: The Indian conglomerate settled with U.S. securities regulators who had accused them of paying bribes and misleading investors, which they denied.

headlines.title: Australia court doubles payout for trans woman in landmark discrimination case
headlines.summary: Roxanne Tickle awarded AU$40,000 in damages for being kicked off the Giggle for Girls app in a landmark ruling on gender identity discrimination.

headlines.title: Five Italians die during cave scuba dive in Maldives
headlines.summary: Four of the Italian victims were part of a team from the University of Genoa. The incident occurred during a cave diving expedition.

headlines.title: US Supreme Court restores abortion pill access for now
headlines.summary: The Supreme Court issued a ruling maintaining access to abortion pills, which are the most common method of terminating pregnancies in the US.

headlines.title: North America's largest commuter rail system faces potential shutdown
headlines.summary: The Long Island Rail Road (LIRR) in New York faces a potential strike that could shut down the largest commuter rail system in North America.

headlines.title: 11 rescued after pilot ditches plane in Atlantic Ocean
headlines.summary: Survivors spent about five hours on a life raft before being rescued by the U.S. Air Force off Florida's coast after their plane was ditched in the Atlantic.
